Name: LOCK_TARGET_PARAM
Description: Defines per-target modifiers that adjust how easily a target can be locked onto by the game's targeting system.

Fields.Name: Maximum Lock-On Range Multiplier
Fields.Description: Percentage multiplier applied to the maximum lock-on distance for this target.

Fields.Name: Lock-On Range Multiplier
Fields.Description: Percentage multiplier applied to the standard lock-on acquisition range for this target.
